compilation_status.description: PASS if the code is completely valid. FAIL if there are syntax, type, or banned tactic errors.

simulated_error_log.description: The terminal output of the simulated Lean 4 compilation. If PASS, write 'No errors'.

banned_tactic_detected.description: True if axiom or sorry were used to cheat.

fix_instructions.description: If FAIL, exactly how do the solvers fix the Lean syntax or type mismatch? If PASS, write 'None'.
